name: NMN exercise-tolerance trial is recruiting without posted results
summary: Recruiting no-results registry testing NMN and a combination supplement arm for exercise tolerance in healthy older adults.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT07144527 as recruiting with 40 estimated participants and no posted results in the June 8, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Healthy older adults with aging, frailty, and exercise-tolerance endpoints
quantitative_note: Registry enrollment is 40; result status is not posted.
caveats: Registry status and design do not provide evidence of benefit.
Any future result should be reviewed before changing the outlook.
No-results status is useful watchlist context, not efficacy evidence.
